original_text: In the broader AI and competitive landscape, Apple Inc. has demonstrated increasing investment in research and development, with R&D expenses rising from $26.3 billion in FY 2022 to $34.6 billion in FY 2025, reflecting ongoing innovation efforts within the competitive technology sector.
revised_text: Apple Inc. has increased its research and development investment, with R&D expenses rising from $26.251 billion in FY 2022 to $34.550 billion in FY 2025.
changes_summary: Removed unsupported claims about AI and competitive landscape as no evidence supports this context, and corrected R&D figures to exact values from evidence chunks to address the critical unsupported claim issue.
